clusters.headline: South Africa: Gauteng Taxi Strike Averted After Talks - South African News Briefs - July 24, 2026
Indian activist Wangchuk ends 26-day hunger strike as 'Cockroach' protesters vow to press on
clusters.summary: Indian activist Sonam Wangchuk ended a 26-day hunger strike on Friday that helped galvanize a youth movement that's become one of India's largest protests in recent years, but demonstrators vowed to continue until the education minister resigns.

clusters.headline: Teen jailed for exam cheating in Guinea dies after sickle cell complications, father says
clusters.summary: Mamadou Djouma Bah, 17, was arrested and sentenced to prison for exam fraud earlier this month.

clusters.headline: U.S. signs nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia. And, Nolan Wells' independent autopsy results
clusters.summary: The U.S. has signed a nuclear cooperation agreement with Saudi Arabia. And, the independent autopsy results of Nolan Wells fuel more questions surrounding his cause of death.

clusters.headline: South Africa: South Africa Dismisses Ghanaian Petition to ICC Over Migrant Violence
clusters.summary: [allAfrica] South Africa has dismissed as "opportunistic" a petition filed at the International Criminal Court by two Ghanaian nationals seeking an investigation into attacks on foreign migrants, arguing the country's legal system is capable of addressing such cases.

clusters.headline: South Africa: Trump's Refugee Policy - Only White South Africans Welcome?
clusters.summary: [DW] Trump is spending more money on refugees, but it's mostly white South Africans who benefit. People from crisis-stricken countries are being denied entry. Experts say the credibility of US refugee aid has been damaged.

clusters.headline: Ex-governor convicted of murdering a pregnant student in Kenya
clusters.summary: Okoth Obado was found guilty of killing Sharon Otieno with whom he had had an affair.

clusters.headline: Nigeria: Three Suspected Terrorists Linked to Oyo School Abduction Plead Guilty to Terrorism Charges
clusters.summary: [Premium Times] The defendants pleaded guilty to eights counts in total out of the 10 charges brought against them.

clusters.headline: Netflix viewers the world over are binge-watching South African series 'The Polygamist.' Here's why
clusters.summary: Why is a Zulu-language drama taking the world by storm? The Polygamist mixes sex and scandal with a sharp portrait of modern South Africa.

clusters.headline: Malaysia foreign minister says envoy summoned by US over Israel policy amid Network School saga
clusters.summary: Network School, the "digital nomad" community founded in Malaysia by US investor Balaji Srinivasan, came under scrutiny after social media users alleged that it included participants from Israel.
